## Summary
Brief description of the changes.

## Related Issue
Fixes #(issue number)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test coverage
- [ ] CI/CD

## Checklist
- [ ] `melos run analyze` passes with no issues
- [ ] `melos run format` passes (no formatting changes needed)
- [ ] `melos run test` passes (all tests green)
- [ ] New code has test coverage
- [ ] Public APIs have `///` doc comments
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if user-facing change)
- [ ] README updated (if API changed)

## Testing
How was this tested? Include steps to verify the changes.
